cards.name: Goblin
cards.lore: Once the cannon fodder of orc warbands, goblins discovered they actually enjoy being first through the door.

cards.name: Archer
cards.lore: "I don't miss." — Every archer, right before missing.

cards.name: Barbarian
cards.lore: Trained by no one, feared by everyone. Mostly feared because of the screaming.

cards.name: Knight
cards.lore: The kingdom's finest. Polished armour hides a spectacular collection of bruises.

cards.name: Wizard
cards.lore: Years of magical study. Thousands of gold in reagents. Wages still less than a goblin.

cards.name: Dragon
cards.lore: When it speaks, kingdoms listen. When it breathes, kingdoms burn.

cards.name: Stone Wall
cards.lore: The first answer to every problem. Usually the second answer too.

cards.name: Farm
cards.lore: Food is mana. Mana is power. This farmer has no idea what he's contributing to.

cards.name: Mana Spring
cards.lore: Nobody can explain where the water comes from. Nobody is asking anymore.

cards.name: Healer's Hut
cards.description: Heals all friendly units 3 HP every 8s. Upgrade: heals every 4s.
cards.lore: "Rest," she says. "It'll hurt less tomorrow." She is usually right.

cards.name: Stone Mason
cards.description: Repairs all friendly walls & structures 8 HP every 10s. Upgrade: every 5s.
cards.lore: Builds walls by day, repairs them by night. He's given up asking why they keep breaking.

cards.name: Blacksmith
cards.description: All friendly units deal +2 damage. Upgrade: +2 more.
cards.lore: Hammer, anvil, fire. In that order. He has opinions about everything else.

cards.name: Barracks
cards.lore: Turns gold into goblins. Economists are still debating whether that's profitable.

cards.name: Arcane Tower
cards.lore: The archers it trains insist they learned everything naturally.

cards.name: Dragon Lair
cards.lore: Do not approach. Do not inquire. Absolutely do not ask about the rent.

cards.name: Sharpen Blades
cards.lore: The whetstone whine echoes across camp. Everyone quietly checks their grip.

cards.name: Fortify
cards.description: Heal all your units for 8 HP.
cards.lore: "Walk it off." — Official battle doctrine.

cards.name: Skeleton
cards.lore: Died once, but keeps showing up. Very dedicated.

cards.name: Troll
cards.lore: You'll know it's coming. You'll have plenty of time to not do anything about it.

cards.name: Crossbow
cards.lore: A technically superior weapon. The operators will tell you at every opportunity.

cards.name: Paladin
cards.lore: Righteous, armoured, and absolutely insufferable at dinner.

cards.name: Rogue
cards.lore: "What wall?" — The Rogue, from the other side of the wall.

cards.name: Catapult
cards.lore: Technically pacifist. It's the rocks that do the violence.

cards.name: Werewolf
cards.lore: Formerly a reasonable accountant.

cards.name: Golem
cards.description: Stone titan — massive HP and damage.
cards.lore: Was told to hold the line. Has been holding it for two hundred years.

cards.name: Pixie
cards.description: Tiny and flying — bypasses all walls.
cards.lore: Shoots first, asks never.

cards.name: Ogre
cards.lore: Large. Loud. Effective. Not necessarily in that order.

cards.name: Crypt
cards.lore: Nobody asked what's in there. Everyone agrees not to.

cards.name: Troll Den
cards.lore: Smells terrible. Keeps the neighbours away.

cards.name: Garrison
cards.lore: A crossbow and a grudge, supplied on rotation.

cards.name: Cathedral
cards.lore: Blessed walls. Blessed warriors. Blessed inconvenient for the enemy.

cards.name: Rogue Den
cards.lore: No sign. No address. Impossible to miss.

cards.name: Siege Works
cards.lore: The engineers here have never met a wall they didn't want to destroy.

cards.name: Dark Shrine
cards.lore: Full moon schedule posted on the door.

cards.name: Iron Forge
cards.lore: Hammers day and night. Nobody sleeps within a mile.

cards.name: Fairy Ring
cards.lore: "Step inside the ring," they said. "It'll be fun," they said.

cards.name: Ogre Den
cards.lore: Listed as "residential" in the tax records.

cards.name: Rally
cards.description: Heal all your units for 4 HP.
cards.lore: A rousing speech, a quick bandage — good as new.

cards.name: Haste
cards.lore: Legs moved so fast they filed a formal complaint.

cards.name: Iron Skin
cards.description: All your units gain +15 max HP.
cards.lore: Toughen up. Literally.

cards.name: Eagle Eye
cards.description: All your units gain +25 attack range.
cards.lore: See further. Regret it only slightly more often.

cards.name: War Drums
cards.lore: The rhythm of violence.

cards.name: Bloodlust
cards.description: All your units surge with furious speed.
cards.lore: Faster. Angrier. Marginally more coordinated.

cards.name: Plague Rat
cards.description: Swarm melee. Incredibly fast attack speed.
cards.lore: One is an annoyance. A hundred is a catastrophe.

cards.name: Bandit
cards.lore: Honest work never paid this well.

cards.name: Bat
cards.lore: Hung upside down until called upon — a skill with surprising tactical applications.

cards.name: Scorpion
cards.lore: Armoured, venomous, grumpy. Triple threat.

cards.name: Shield Guard
cards.lore: Move? Why would I move?

cards.name: Centaur
cards.lore: The upper half writes poetry. The lower half doesn't know.

cards.name: Harpy
cards.description: Flying ranged — swoops over walls and shoots.
cards.lore: Sings beautifully. Fights savagely. Never at the same time.

cards.name: Specter
cards.lore: Died defending the post. Still defending it.

cards.name: Lizardman
cards.lore: Cold-blooded. Professionally and personally.

cards.name: Ballista
cards.description: Siege bolt — extreme range, fires over walls.
cards.lore: "Fire the ballista!" — said with far too much enthusiasm every time.

cards.name: Vampire
cards.lore: Charming until the biting starts. Sometimes also during the biting.

cards.name: Griffin
cards.lore: Half eagle, half lion, all opinion.

cards.name: Fire Mage
cards.description: Glass cannon — scorches enemies through walls.
cards.lore: Extremely dangerous. Mostly to itself.

cards.name: Executioner
cards.description: Devastating melee blow — one hit, one kill.
cards.lore: Does not like being told there is more than one swing allowed.

cards.name: Mammoth
cards.description: Armored beast — crushes through melee lines.
cards.lore: Once a peaceful grazer. Someone put armour on it.

cards.name: Dark Elf
cards.description: Ranged climber — scales walls then snipes.
cards.lore: Watches from the shadows. Shoots from the shadows. Lives in the shadows. Hates dentist appointments.

cards.name: Necromancer
cards.lore: Death is just unemployment with extra steps.

cards.name: Giant
cards.description: Towering brute — enormous HP and damage.
cards.lore: Slow. Inevitable. Cannot open doors, but rarely needs to.

cards.name: Wyvern
cards.description: Fast flying ranged — dominates from the air.
cards.lore: The dragon's practical cousin. Less fire, more punctuality.

cards.name: Behemoth
cards.lore: There is no plan B for a Behemoth. There is often no plan A left either.

cards.name: Rat Burrow
cards.lore: The smell announces them long before they arrive.

cards.name: Bandit Camp
cards.lore: Technically a business.

cards.name: Bat Cave
cards.lore: Dark inside. Dark outside. Mostly just dark.

cards.name: Scorpion Pit
cards.lore: HR has filed fourteen complaints about working conditions.

cards.name: Guard Post
cards.lore: Stand and deliver. Mostly stand.

cards.name: Centaur Stable
cards.lore: It's not a stable, they keep insisting.

cards.name: Harpy Roost
cards.lore: Do not look up.

cards.name: Spirit Well
cards.lore: The water is fine. The spirits are not.

cards.name: Lizard Warren
cards.lore: Warm, underground, and excellent acoustics.

cards.name: Ballista Tower
cards.lore: The elevator is broken. Engineers don't care.

cards.name: Vamp. Coven
cards.lore: Meets at midnight. Dress code: dramatic.

cards.name: Aerie
cards.lore: Spectacular view. Treacherous access. Worth it.

cards.name: Mage Tower
cards.lore: Full of books, experiments, and extremely anxious junior mages.

cards.name: Gallows
cards.lore: Structural integrity questionable. Attendance mandatory.

cards.name: Mammoth Pen
cards.lore: Do not feed after dark. Do not feed before dark either.

cards.name: Shadow Academy
cards.lore: Curriculum: archery, shadows, and sighing at lesser beings.

cards.name: Death Tower
cards.lore: The door is unlocked. Nobody goes in uninvited.

cards.name: Giant's Hall
cards.lore: The ceiling keeps getting raised.

cards.name: Wyvern Roost
cards.lore: Perched atop the cliff where nothing else dares to live.

cards.name: Ancient Altar
cards.lore: Old beyond memory. Hungry beyond measure.

cards.name: Field Medic
cards.description: Heal all your units for 6 HP.
cards.lore: Not a real medic. Effective anyway.

cards.name: Titan Blood
cards.description: All your units gain +20 max HP.
cards.lore: Thick. Extremely thick.

cards.name: Sniper Scope
cards.description: All your units gain +30 attack range.
cards.lore: For those who believe range is the solution to all problems.

cards.name: Battle Cry
cards.lore: Loud. Effective. No subtlety whatsoever.

cards.name: Vine Golem
cards.description: Slow forest brute — twisted vines for fists.
cards.lore: The forest did not build it. The forest became it.

cards.name: Spore Bat
cards.lore: Releases a cloud of confusion before the claws arrive.

cards.name: Thornbeast
cards.description: Climbing beast covered in razor thorns.
cards.lore: Whatever it used to be, the forest has claimed it fully.

cards.name: Elder Treant
cards.lore: It has been here since before the Fracture. It plans to be here after.

cards.name: Frog Knight
cards.lore: Somehow obtained full plate armour. Nobody asked where.

cards.name: Thornwall
cards.description: Reinforced thorn barrier — tougher than stone.
cards.lore: The thorns grow back faster than you can cut them.

cards.name: Ancient Grove
cards.lore: Old enough to remember when the forest covered everything.

cards.name: Ironclad Guard
cards.description: Heavily armored — barely moves, never falls.
cards.lore: Has never retreated. Has never needed to.

cards.name: War Drummer
cards.description: Rallies the march — steady melee brawler.
cards.lore: The beat sets the pace. The pace sets the outcome.

cards.name: Siege Engineer
cards.description: Ranged expert — fires over walls from distance.
cards.lore: Turns distance into an advantage. Turns walls into a suggestion.

cards.name: Shield Wall Soldier
cards.lore: The first to arrive. The last to fall. Usually the first to fall.

cards.name: Grizzled Veteran
cards.lore: Has survived things that should not be survivable. Very annoyed about it.

cards.name: Armory
cards.lore: Every soldier who leaves here is better armed. Most come back.

cards.name: Command Tent
cards.description: +1 max mana. The iron citadel runs on logistics.
cards.lore: Where strategy happens. Mostly arguing, but strategy.

cards.name: Bone Archer
cards.lore: Accuracy improves significantly without the burden of a heartbeat.

cards.name: Wight Knight
cards.description: Armored undead — relentless and hard to kill.
cards.lore: The armour corrodes. The knight does not.

cards.name: Ash Elemental
cards.description: Flying scorched spirit — burns through all defenses.
cards.lore: Born from the Fracture's scorched aftermath. Still burning.

cards.name: Revenant
cards.description: Fast flying ghost — refuses to stay dead.
cards.lore: Kept returning until everyone stopped asking why.

cards.name: Lich Apprentice
cards.lore: Still learning. Still deadly. The tuition is paid in souls.

cards.name: Bone Wall
cards.description: Skeletal barrier — sturdier than it looks.
cards.lore: Unpleasant to look at. Effective to hide behind.

cards.name: Soul Obelisk
cards.lore: Whispers things. Nobody agrees on what.

heroCards.name: Dragon Lord
heroCards.description: HERO: Deploys a mighty Dragon & grants all units +6 attack!
heroCards.lore: Commands dragons. Dragons pretend not to notice.

heroCards.name: Battle Queen
heroCards.description: HERO: Deploys an armored Paladin & fortifies all units with +20 max HP!
heroCards.lore: Won sixteen wars. Lost zero negotiations.

heroCards.name: Storm Caller
heroCards.description: HERO: Deploys a fearsome Wyvern & blesses all units with +40 attack range!
heroCards.lore: The sky does what she says. Eventually.

heroCards.name: Shadow King
heroCards.description: HERO: Deploys a savage Werewolf & surges all units with +25 speed!
heroCards.lore: Feared in twelve kingdoms. Banned from two taverns specifically.

heroCards.name: Death Lord
heroCards.description: HERO: Deploys a sinister Lich Apprentice who summons a skeleton army & hastens all units with -500ms attack cooldown!
heroCards.lore: Death is just a job. A very grim job, but somebody's got to do it.

heroCards.name: Forest Guardian
heroCards.description: HERO: Deploys a mighty Elder Treant & rejuvenates all units with +4 HP heal every 10s!
heroCards.lore: The forest is alive. It has opinions on your strategy.

heroCards.name: Swarm Queen
heroCards.description: HERO: Deploys a mischievous Pixie & commands it to spawn a Spore Bat for you every 10s!
heroCards.lore: The swarm is a family. A very bitey family.

heroCards.name: Graham The All Seeing
heroCards.lore: Sees all. Knows all. Still can't find his keys. Play tested by Graham, who is indeed all seeing.
